response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY. RINSE MOUTH WITH WATER AFTER MEALS. AVOID HARD FOODS TO PREVENT DAMAGE.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS TO PROTECT THE TOOTH. FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY TO AVOID MORE HARM. BOX MATERIALS CAN BE FOUND AT PHARMACIES.  
* * *  
PAIN MANAGEMENT IS IMPORTANT FOR COMFORT. USE IBUPROFEN OR ACETAMINOPHEN AS DIRECTED. AVOID ASPIRIN TO PREVENT BLEEDING.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
SALTWATER RINSING HELPS REDUCE INFLAMMATION. MIX SALT WITH WARM WATER FOR EFFECTIVE RINSING. TRADITIONALLY USED FOR ORAL HYGIENE.  
* * *  
MONITOR TOOTH FOR CHANGES AND INFECTION SIGNS. SEEK DENTAL CARE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. TWO WEEKS DELAY CAN CAUSE SEVERE PROBLEMS.  
*HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
AVOID CHALLENGING FOODS TO REDUCE PAIN AND SENSITIVITY. CHOOSE SOFT FOODS FOR EASY DIGESTION. CAR STOPS CAN BE USED TO REST DURING MEALS.  
* * *  
DON’T DELAY TREATMENT EVEN IF IT’S DIFFICULT. LOOK FOR DENTAL CARE OPTIONS IN YOUR AREA. TWO OPTIONS MAY BE FOUND IN LOCAL COMMUNITIES.
